styles.name: Avantgarde Bw Poster
styles.scene: AI/科技封面、思想类内容、先锋艺术海报、现代主义设计展、创意封面
styles.summary: 克制、秩序、先锋 —— 不追求信息密度，用极简几何和字体排版制造视觉张力。
features: **黑白灰层次丰富**：至少4种灰度层次，纯黑、暗灰、中灰、浅灰、白色交替
**随机字体排版**：巨型横排/竖排/横竖混排/靠边/居中/压底/分散式等多种方向
**随机几何母题**：从20+种几何元素中随机选择2-4种组合
**6大几何家族**：圆形家族、线性家族、块面家族、空间家族、网格纹理、结构符号
**极简强调色**：只使用1种颜色，1-2处，面积不超过画面2%
**10种构图骨架**：中央/上下错层/斜向/环绕/四角张力/满版字体/极端留白/垂直轴/水平轴/分散式
**克制信息量**：不能变成杂志目录，追求秩序和结构

styles.name: Jimeng Kasho Allstars
styles.scene: 夜店活动海报、派对宣传、潮流品牌活动
styles.summary: Y2K酸性设计结合孟菲斯复古未来主义的夜店潮流活动海报，以3D充气软胶质感为核心视觉语言。
features: **色彩体系**：纯黑底色 + 亮蓝 + 暖橙 + 纯白的高饱和撞色
**材质工艺**：3D 膨胀充气软胶质感，C4D+Octane 渲染，均匀细腻的哑光颗粒肌理，圆润光滑的高光
**核心元素**：充气软胶孟菲斯几何元素 — 亮蓝弯曲管道、透明圆环、原子结构支架、星芒、旋钮、暖橙十字块、网格块、爆炸星、白色云朵、骨头、粉蓝渐变嘴唇、黑白眼球
**版式布局**：顶部品牌标识/热线信息 → 超大号粗体主标题「ALL STARS」→ 下半部分活动详情/日期/嘉宾名单
**文字风格**：现代无衬线字体，严格网格系统排版，文字层级清晰
**整体调性**：潮酷活泼、年轻化夜店氛围感，商业级活动海报质感

styles.name: Style Halftone Poster
styles.scene: A sparse retro PSA poster system where one visible class of material is arranged into a different recognizable symbolic silhouette, printed as a muted blue-green halftone object on aged cream paper with compact red-and-navy campaign typography.
styles.summary: A sparse retro PSA poster system where one visible class of material is arranged into a different recognizable symbolic silhouette, printed as a muted blue-green halftone object on aged cream paper with compact red-and-navy campaign typography.
features: The central idea is material-as-symbol: one category of visible source objects must be assembled into a different readable target silhouette.
The target silhouette must read clearly from a distance before the viewer notices the individual source pieces.
The source material must remain legible up close through repeated parts, seams, caps, folds, cables, rims, labels, or textures.
Aged warm cream paper background with visible grain and faint uneven printing.
One dominant blue-green halftone assemblage object, placed as a sculptural PSA metaphor rather than a realistic scene.

features: Preserve the core visual identity: A bold minimalist editorial poster style using low-angle hero photography inside a diamond aperture, folded tan paper or canvas planes, and oversized white perspective typography printed across the lower surface.
Shoot the subject as a real-photo low-angle hero image with wide-lens foreshortening, strong sunlight, and a bright cyan sky or clean outdoor backdrop.
Layout: place the photo inside a large rotated square diamond aperture in the upper half of a tactile folded tan paper or linen canvas surface.
Typography: set MAIN_TEXT in enormous white ultra-bold condensed sans-serif type across the lower half.
Make the type feel printed onto the folded surface, split by the central crease, distorted by perspective, cropped by the poster edges, and lightly textured by the paper grain.

features: Preserve the core visual identity: A bright travel-photo collage style that overlays giant flat 2D cartoon travelers, fantastical folk-art fish, black marker loops, splash marks, and comic starbursts onto realistic landmark photography.
Photo base: use a realistic bright travel photograph with clear natural daylight, postcard-like scenic depth, readable sky and water or architecture, and a believable tourist-view perspective.
Illustration layer: overlay one oversized flat 2D illustrated subject across the foreground and middle ground.

The subject should look pasted or screen-printed on top of the photo, with opaque flat color fills, thick black hand-drawn outlines, simplified hands or face, exaggerated scale, playful anatomy, and bold graphic wardrobe colors.
Doodle layer: add ACCENT_SYMBOL plus loose black marker loops, ink starbursts, blue water drops, curved strings, short splash dashes, and motion ticks as an independent graphic layer.
